title: AI System Risk Classifier
subtitle: Determine which EU AI Act risk tier applies to your AI system

prohibited.title: Prohibited Practices
prohibited.description: Check whether your AI system falls under Article 5 prohibited practices

gpai.title: General-Purpose AI
gpai.description: Determine if your system qualifies as a GPAI model

gpaiSystemic.title: Systemic Risk Assessment
gpaiSystemic.description: Assess whether your GPAI model poses systemic risk

highRisk.title: High-Risk Classification
highRisk.description: Check Annex I safety components and Annex III use cases

limited.title: Limited Risk (Transparency)
limited.description: Check transparency obligations for your AI system

questions.socialScoring: Does the system perform social scoring by public authorities?
questions.biometricRealtime: Does it use real-time remote biometric identification in public spaces for law enforcement?
questions.subliminal: Does it deploy subliminal, manipulative, or deceptive techniques to distort behavior?
questions.vulnerability: Does it exploit vulnerabilities of specific groups (age, disability, social/economic situation)?
questions.facialScraping: Does it perform untargeted scraping of facial images from the internet or CCTV?
questions.emotionWorkplace: Does it infer emotions in workplace or educational settings (except medical/safety)?
questions.biometricCategorization: Does it use biometric categorization to infer sensitive attributes?
questions.predictivePolicing: Does it perform individual predictive policing based solely on profiling?
questions.isGpai: Is your system a general-purpose AI model (foundation model, LLM, or built on one)?
questions.flopsThreshold: Was it trained with more than 10^25 FLOPs of compute?
questions.designatedSystemic: Has it been designated by the EU AI Office as posing systemic risk?
questions.annexISafety: Is the system a safety component of a product covered by EU harmonisation legislation (Annex I)?
questions.annexIIIBiometrics: Does it involve biometric identification, categorization, or emotion recognition?
questions.annexIIIInfrastructure: Is it a safety component in critical infrastructure management?
questions.annexIIIEducation: Does it determine access to education or evaluate learning outcomes?
questions.annexIIIEmployment: Is it used in recruitment, selection, or workforce management?
questions.annexIIIEssentialServices: Does it affect access to essential private or public services?
questions.annexIIILawEnforcement: Is it used by law enforcement for risk assessment or evidence evaluation?
questions.annexIIIMigration: Is it used in migration, asylum, or border control management?
questions.annexIIIJustice: Is it used in administration of justice or democratic processes?
questions.transparencyObligations: Does the system interact directly with natural persons, generate synthetic content, or perform emotion recognition?

prohibited.title: Prohibited AI System
prohibited.description: Your AI system is prohibited under Article 5 of the EU AI Act. It cannot be placed on the EU market or put into service.
prohibited.action: Discontinue development or fundamentally redesign to remove prohibited capabilities.

high-risk.title: High-Risk AI System
high-risk.description: Your AI system is classified as high-risk under Annex I or Annex III. Extensive compliance obligations apply.
high-risk.action: Complete the high-risk compliance checklist, implement a quality management system, and prepare technical documentation.

gpai.title: General-Purpose AI Model
gpai.description: Your model is classified as GPAI under Articles 51-53. Transparency and documentation obligations apply.
gpai.action: Complete the GPAI compliance checklist, including model cards, training data documentation, and copyright compliance.

gpai-systemic.title: GPAI with Systemic Risk
gpai-systemic.description: Your model is classified as GPAI with systemic risk under Articles 51 and 55. Enhanced obligations apply.
gpai-systemic.action: Complete the GPAI systemic risk checklist, including adversarial testing, incident monitoring, and cybersecurity measures.

limited.title: Limited Risk AI System
limited.description: Your AI system has transparency obligations. Users must be informed they are interacting with AI.
limited.action: Implement transparency measures: disclose AI interaction, label synthetic content, inform about emotion recognition.

minimal.title: Minimal Risk AI System
minimal.description: Your AI system has no mandatory obligations beyond existing law. Voluntary codes of conduct are encouraged.
minimal.action: Consider adopting voluntary codes of conduct and best practices for trustworthy AI.
